zh: 孩子學說話、是嘗試錯誤法、
en: Children learn to speak through trial and error.
If they pronounce a word wrong,
for example saying "shyao guo" instead of "shyao gou,"

zh: 別罵他也別強迫他再說一次、
en: don't scold them or force them to repeat it,

zh: 以免影響孩童學說話的興趣、
en: so as not to dampen their interest in learning to speak.

zh: 父母只要在旁邊把正確的說一遍、
en: Parents can simply say the word correctly alongside them,
so the child hears the right pronunciation.

zh: 孩子如果馬上模仿、馬上稱讚他、
en: If the child imitates immediately, praise them right away,

zh: 如果沒有也不要責備孩子。
en: and if they don't, never scold them for it.
